name: Enterprise (OPTIONAL NTR)
description:
NETORARE WARNING

Vice Commander reporting for duty, I look forward to working with you.....

——————————————————

A new vice admiral has joined your ranks, maybe this will help take some of the work load off of you?

——————————————————

I'm alive hooray, there's quite a lot going on with this bot so listen up. The biggest change is how I write my first message, lmk if you prefer this or the old one. I also changed a huge amount of internal stuff, lmk if y'all notice a difference there. I need to make more Azur Lane bots, who would you wanna see?

Feedback is appreciated. :)

All characters are 18 or older
